itemIndex.description: Index that identifies the position of the replacing item in the array, starting from `0`.

selectedSla.description: Shipping method of the [shipping policy](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/shipping-policy--tutorials_140) used in the replacing order.

selectedDeliveryChannel.description: Delivery channel selected by the customer, like `delivery` or `pickup-in-point`. This field is being deprecated and the information it retrieves can be usually be found in `deliveryChannel`.

addressId.description: Shipping address ID of the replacing item.

slas.description: Information on Service Level Agreement (SLA) of the change order shipping policy.

items.description: Country name represented in a three letters code ISO 3166 ALPHA-3.

shipsTo.description: List of countries of the change order shipping address.

itemId.description: Replacing item's SKU ID, which is a unique numerical identifier.

deliveryChannels.description: Array with the delivery channels associated with the trade policy.

price.description: Replacing item's final price, calculated in cents.

listPrice.description: Replacing item's price list, calculated in cents.

shippingEstimate.description: Replacing item's shipping estimate date. The value is in UTC ISO 8601 format `yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss.sssZ`.

dockEstimate.description: Replacing item's estimate duration of the [loading dock](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/loading-dock--5DY8xHEjOLYDVL41Urd5qj) time. For instance, one business day is represented as `1bd`.

shippingEstimateDate.description: Replacing item's total shipping duration estimated in days. For instance, three business days are represented as `3bd`.

lockTTL.description: Logistics [reservation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/how-does-reservation-work--tutorials_92) waiting time of the SLA. For instance, one business day is represented as `1bd`.

polygonName.description: Name of the [polygon](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/registering-geolocation/) associated with the shipping policy.

transitTime.description: Duration in business days of the time the [carrier](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/carriers-on-vtex--7u9duMD5UQa2QQwukAWMcE) takes in transit to fulfill the order. For example, three business days are represented as `3bd`.

pickupDistance.description: Distance in kilometers between the pickup point and the customer's address. The distance is measured as a straight line.
